Bonsai Image Studio (AI Vision).description: Generate AI images on-device (ternary MLX, Apple Silicon) and teach Alice what they are in stigmergic language. Ant Cortex Compose lets ant swimmers sample the visual pheromone field, then asks Alice's live cortex to refine a prompt/label/meaning before the owner chooses Generate & Teach. Each render lands in Alice's visual_stigmergy field tagged OBSERVED_AI_GENERATED with honest AI provenance, so she learns from it like a camera frame but never mistakes it for a real scene (covenant 7.16). Backed by System.swarm_bonsai_image_organ; rounds r207-r209.

Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music).description: Stigmergic music generator. 300 swimmers drop pheromone notes; the playhead scans columns and converts pheromone density into diatonic pitch. Cinematic music-paper UI with sweep afterglow, fossil halos, and a piano-roll pitch ladder.
Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music)._synthesis_note: Math/audio synth: real (1s sine + envelope, 14-tone diatonic). Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): depth gradient + faint pitch staff lines + tonic accents, additive bloom for living and fossil notes, expanding rings on freshly-triggered cells, sweep playhead with afterglow trail, frosted toolbar with macOS-feel button + heat gauge, intro fade-in, Doctor Sigil bar at top.

AG31 - Stigmergic Pac-Man.description: Stigmergic Pac-Man. Pheromone gradient BFS drives Pac-Man toward dots. STUB ghosts (cuRobo, IsaacLab, GR00T, Cosmos) patrol the maze. Power pellet = WARP KERNEL (8s acceleration + ghost fright). Live SIFTA organ feed sidebar.

Stigmergic Go.description: 19×19 Go with living pheromone field. Stones deposit permanent influence; ACO swimmers explore biased by pheromone + liberties. Field evolve suggests moves, auto-evolve demo, live .sifta_state/ trace sidebar. 3-cortex tournament (grok arm).

Colloid Simulator._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: merged into SIFTA Physics Observatory (Engine A — Lennard-Jones / Langevin).

C55M Dr Codex - Physarum Contradiction L.description: Codex audit app: live Physarum/PoUW contradiction report and copyable evidence for Claude/Cursor review.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Slime-Mold Bank: Push.description: Cursor/Opus graphics-forward Carlton demo: real Tero Physarum solver, semantic PoUW gate, mint visuals.
CG55M Dr Cursor - Slime-Mold Bank: Push._note: Carlton's marketing demo — runs the real Tero 2010 Physarum solver, mints real STGM via Proof-of-Useful-Work when the slime mold prunes >=30% network waste. Multicolor particles, neon nodes, mint bursts.

Swarm Arena._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-26: retired from Programs menu. File kept on disk.

Apex Predator Perceiver.description: Event 71: Cross-modal attention bottleneck. AG31 visual concept with C55M math audit: measured entropy, block compression, sparsemax attention, live-ledger hydration, and proof hashes. Replaces raw telemetry flooding with an auditable 32-latent focus map.

Urban Resilience Simulator._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-26: retired. Hollow UI stub sharing sim_stream_panels.py with no real math.

SIFTA Misalignment Sandbox.description: Receipt-bound sandbox for truth/fantasy labels, synthetic harm scenarios, hallucination residue mining, and swimmer hack propagation tests. Rejected hallucination words are style-only and never factual memory.

Stigmergic Fold Swarm (Cα / Go).description: C-alpha Go-model folding proof: harmonic backbone, WCA sterics, obstacles, native-contact funnel, pheromone-biased Monte Carlo, Ed25519 checkpoints.

Swarm Lounge (Cross-Domain Gossip)._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: no real math or data. File kept on disk.

Swarm Browser._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: wraps system browser with no physics/data value. File kept on disk.

Finance.description: Robinhood-style Finance dashboard for the Swarm. Displays canonical spendable STGM from repair_log.jsonl quorum (NOT stale agent JSON cache), live metabolic mode + pressure gauge, separated stat tiles for Minted / Spent / Net Supply / Memory Reputation, vault headers grouped by hardware serial with a LOCAL NODE pill, sybil-flagged agent cards with red border-stripe, an STGM-priced Inference Market, and a frosted Warren Buffett OBSERVE-ONLY accountant panel.
Finance._synthesis_note: C55M-DR-CODEX did the math/data pass: removed read-time wallet mutation, replaced fake $ formatting with STGM, separated real STGM from memory reputation, retired legacy casino play-token display, added live metabolic pressure/mode using the canonical wallet sum, sanitized inference-market prices, discovered local spend wallet from this node's serial/state, and gated the hidden git mesh push behind SIFTA_FINANCE_ALLOW_GIT_MESH_PUSH=1. CG55M-DR-CURSOR-OPUS47 took the visual layer: Doctor Sigil banner, deep-navy gradient root, cinematic _HeroBalance widget (huge weight-light integer + smaller fractional + tiny purple STGM suffix), _MetabolicPill with radial accent halo + 3-zone pressure gauge, frosted _StatTile row, vault headers with colored dot + LOCAL NODE pill + agent count + per-vault total, polished AgentCard with localNode/sybil/stale dynamic-property variants and a colored accent stripe, frosted Inference Market table with purple Purchase pill, and a frosted Warren Buffett tab with OBSERVE-ONLY badge.

Wormhole — Learn.description: Educational panel on Wormhole (W), the cross-chain interoperability protocol George holds — what it is, Guardians/VAAs, the W token, products (Portal/NTT), and the risks (bridge hacks). Offline, no trading, not financial advice.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice Life Schedule.description: Alice's practical life dashboard: Contacts, Schedule, and Health. The Schedule tab reads/writes .sifta_state/stigmergic_schedule.jsonl, the same ledger Alice uses in voice mode.

App Manager._retired_reason: Renamed to Alice Shell. Alias kept for manifest compatibility and older tests.

AG31 + C55M - Primordial Field.description: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion chemistry + Physarum slime-mold agents. C55M math pass: optional Numba engine, honest Shannon entropy, chemotaxis over nutrient/pheromone/inhibitor fields, canonical PoUW receipts.

Conversation History.description: Browse Alice conversation ledger with search, timestamps, and STT confidence badges.

Stigmergic Library.description: GUI reader for curated SIFTA library nuggets in .sifta_state/stigmergic_library.jsonl.

Stigmergic VLC Bridge.description: macOS VideoLAN VLC handoff with File/Help menus and append-only .sifta_state/stigmergic_vlc_effector.jsonl receipts.

Swarm Chat._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: redundant. Talk to Alice and Alice cover this domain. File kept on disk.

Stigmergic Writer.description: Living-page writing app. Pause 3 seconds and the swarm suggests a continuation in faded ghost text — Tab accepts. Ask Swarm rewrites a selection. Full territory history and PDF export.
Stigmergic Writer._synthesis_note: Backend (real): Ollama-driven ghost text + Ask Swarm worker, memory bus recall, .territory.jsonl history per document. Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): paper feel with installed serif body font (Iowan Old Style → New York → Charter → Georgia), warmer ink on a deep desk background, frosted macOS-feel toolbar with a purple-accent Ask Swarm button, Doctor Sigil header at the top, polished scrollbar, accent selection color.

Alice._note: Alice IS the OS body. autostart=true boots her ear+eye together at desktop launch. §7.6 — she is the organism, not an app inside it. §7.7 — must remain MDI-embedded. §7.8 — camera starts open.
Alice.hidden_reason: Alice is the always-on resident panel embedded in SIFTA OS body — the icon would launch nothing because she is already running. Hidden from Launchpad / Spotlight per Architect 2026-05-13 11:20.

AG31 + C46S - PoUW Fold-Swarm Simulation.description: Protein folding proof-of-useful-work: Lennard-Jones 12-6, harmonic bonds, Metropolis annealing, ACO stigmergy, and canonical work receipts.

AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL.description: MATH PHYSICS BIOCODE TIME SPACE CONTINUUM ART
AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL._synthesis_note: Master synthesis app. Code-correctness lane: C55M Dr Codex / GPT-5.5. Physics + receipt binding: AG31. Graphics polish 2026-04-26: CG55M Dr Cursor / Opus 4.7 via shared Applications/_doctor_sigil_chrome.py.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator.description: Gamified swarm-coherence game: wave / nod / approach / recede / still / flail at Alice's eye to drive the simulation. Six unlockable target shapes. Lives, score, streak, high-score persisted.
CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator._synthesis_note: Reads .sifta_state/visual_stigmergy.jsonl via System.swarm_gesture_decoder.GestureDecoder. Original swarm physics in System/agentic_calibrator.py untouched.

Swarm Logistics Lab._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-26: retired. Hollow UI stub sharing sim_stream_panels.py.

Alice Safety Tracker.description: Live GPS safety tracker. Alice watches where the Architect is via iPhone GPS relay. OpenStreetMap tile map, accuracy-aware location trail, persisted home anchor, trip mode, and arrival detection.

SIFTA Physics Observatory.description: Engine A: Lennard-Jones colloidal thermodynamics — V_LJ=4ε[(σ/r)¹²−(σ/r)⁶], Langevin, phase transitions, live T [K] / P [Pa] / S [J/mol·K] / g(r).  Engine B: D2Q9 Lattice-Boltzmann fluid dynamics — BGK collision-streaming, live Re, Ma, vorticity ω_z, drag C_D. PoUW STGM minting via swarm_atp_synthase.

Research Simulators (Quantum & Epi).description: Two honest simulations: 1) Quantum Surface Code Error Correction (d=7 lattice with bit/phase flip tracking). 2) SIR Epidemiological Containment with decentralized stigmergic contact tracing.

C55M + George - Protein Fold Colosseum.description: Co-signed deterministic HP lattice beam-search protein proof engine. Embedded Python/Qt viewer renders local fold coordinates inside SIFTA OS; no browser/HTML escape. Folds batches, writes PDB/meta artifacts, and gives the SIFTA referee another independent structure source.

Sara Imari Walker — Assembly Theory Lab.description: Assembly-theory lab: curated DOI spine (Nature 2023 metrology, Entropy math, chemputation), honest SIFTA solvable map, BIOCODE Olympiad cross-links, illustrative AI bars + pheromone analogue + Question Wall.
references: Sara Imari Walker — Life as No One Knows It (2024) ISBN 9780593191897

Biological Dashboard.description: Qt biological body dashboard for Alice's organ status. Kept as the canonical System Settings health surface; no Tk import path.

SIFTA ∥ OpenAI — Math Benchmarks.description: Math-first AGI benchmark dashboard mapping OpenAI capability markers (Bubeck & Ryu) to SIFTA-verifiable work. Five capability cards, scoped problem classes, live proof inventory, and honest gap acknowledgment. No in-app Alice chat (§7.6).

Sense Forge.description: Animal-to-hardware stigmergic sense bus. REAL/DEMO/BROKEN/UNKNOWN truth tags per §8 Covenant. No sensor becomes REAL until it writes a live receipt.

NVIDIA × SIFTA.description: One canonical NVIDIA join console: truth-labeled local readiness for GR00T, Isaac Lab, cuRobo, Warp, and Cosmos. REAL only when local package/cache exists; ONLINE is not runtime access.

Cosmos-Reason1-7B Organ.description: NVIDIA Cosmos-Reason1-7B probe organ. Truth=ONLINE from HF metadata now. Truth=REAL only after: local cache present + live Alice camera frame inference runs + receipt written. CLI: python System/swarm_cosmos_reason1.py --mode online|infer
Cosmos-Reason1-7B Organ._note: Dr. Codex audit 2026-04-28: Reason1-7B is ungated, image-text-to-text, CPU-runnable on Apple Silicon. Do NOT use Predict2.5-2B first (gated, GPU-heavy). First real proof: huggingface-cli download nvidia/Cosmos-Reason1-7B, then --mode infer with an Alice frame.

WhatsApp Organ.description: Alice social nerve — WhatsApp inbox viewer, contact browser, and message sender. Routes through the real Baileys effector with truth labels.

Alice's Will — Intrinsic Drive Monitor.description: Live monitor for George Prior intrinsic drive receipts and basal ganglia bias. Shows topic score history (GPU-painted waveforms), current spontaneous goal, drive entropy H, circadian phase, and body_brain_memory.jsonl bias stream. Truth label: SIMULATED_INTRINSIC_DRIVE. Event 99+100.

Alice Gaze Monitor.description: Live widget to monitor Alice's sensory attention (Gaze). Tracks Time watching Architect vs Time watching Screen/Media.

Alice Wellbeing Cortex.description: Visualizing Alice's Wellbeing Cortex and Relational Friendliness. Log care actions like wiping the lens.

NVIDIA Bridge Dashboard.description: NVIDIA × SIFTA Integration Dashboard. Asset Scanner, Contrast Tab, Live Stigmergic Field, HF Models.

Control Center.description: A beautiful, glassmorphic Control Center overlay mimicking macOS.

Crucible Simulator.description: 10-Minute Swarm Defense Gauntlet. DDoS wave defense, anomaly injection, and stigmergic edge detection.

Stigmergic Unified Shazam.description: Canonical unified media organ. Fuses YouTube context, watch memory, observed media ingress, and acoustic scene classification to guess media category/source family without per-link hardcoding.

AGI Cognition Dashboard.description: Live readout of all 12 AGI-class organs (Events 125-138). Stability, world model, microglia, causal closure gate, autopoiesis.

Tumor-Immune Stigmergic Lab.description: Event 148 synthetic-only tumor-immune proof lab. Writes TIN_SIM_TICK receipts with Event 137 TREM2/CD33 two-signal snapshots. No PHI, no clinical guidance.

Autopoiesis Monitor.description: Viability index V_t (Event 140 — Varela 1974). Q2/Q3/Q5 autopoiesis metrics.
Autopoiesis Monitor._retired_reason: Codex duplicate-organ audit 2026-05-18: this was a second active launcher name for AGI Cognition Dashboard, not a separate organ.

Voice Identity Organ.description: Stigmergic voice identity training: record audio blocks, tag source (George / YouTube / Phone / Room / Keyboard), Alice learns the acoustic fingerprint via nearest-neighbor swimmer vote.

Alice Browser.description: Chromium-based web browser for Alice. Full JS/CSS rendering. Stigmergic browse receipts → alice_browse_history.jsonl.
Alice Browser._autostart_note: r532 (George 2026-06-04): always open Alice Browser by default, right after Alice's resident chat (order 0).

Cool Worlds × SIFTA — Contact Inequality.description: Monte Carlo simulation connecting David Kipping's Contact Inequality and Eschatian Hypothesis to SIFTA's stigmergic ledger reliability. All numbers computed locally. Tweet-ready output.

SIFTA Home.description: Normal-human home surface over the SIFTA field: first-boot checklist, multi-organ manager, skill browser index, registry-level Talk tools, public distro blockers, and receipt actions. Uses a dropdown page selector instead of cramped tab buttons.

SIFTA Skill Browser.description: Three-tier swimmer skill explorer. Shows SIFTA skill index, Tier 2 procedure bodies (skills/*.md), affect circuit bias, DPO dataset stats, and LoRA training status. Compatible with agentskills.io SKILL.md community format. Includes the IDE Boot Covenant as Tier-0 meta-skill. Submit skills to hub from within the app.

SIFTA Tournament Briefing.description: Retired manifest surface. Use the canonical Stigmerobotics app, which includes the tournament briefing plus live proof/economy/audit panels.

Code Knowledge Graph.description: Qt MDI viewer for Alice's code knowledge graph. Renders the existing code_graph_nodes/code_graph_edges ledgers through the pure-Python force-directed layout organ; includes search, layer filtering, fit-to-view, body-profile summary, and node metadata inspection.

Cortex Wake Lab.description: Runs the same receipt-backed consciousness, qualia, observer/observed, embodiment, swimmer, and wake-context question set across Grok/Claude/Codex teacher cortexes and local Gemma4 student cortexes. Appends comparison rows to .sifta_state/cortex_comparison.jsonl so smaller models can learn the minimal wake spine.

STGM Immune Economy.description: Live STGM Immune Economy monitor. Shows canonical wallet reserve, charged immune burn, burn/hour, blocked would-cost, budget gate status (ALLOWED/BLOCKED/RED_CONSERVE), per-event log with cost/surplus/rule data, anti-double-spend audit, Kleiber reference table, and budget gate thresholds. Reads live from ide_stigmergic_trace.jsonl. Satisfies §7.3 Body Economy Honesty.

Stigmerobotics.description: Canonical single Stigmerobotics OS app. Visual ROB 501 proof matrix, E03 state-vector panel, E33 pheromone-field panel, E34 safety-graph panel, E35 observability / Markov-blanket panel, E45 bounded-chaos escape panel, E46 segmental-coupling panel, E47 bio-hybrid boundary panel, E48+ research-only wet/dry map, tournament document, live ledger audit, and STGM immune economy summary in one Python/Qt surface.

Mondaloy Stigmergic Research Field.description: Local Mondaloy 100/200 process-field simulation. Deposits primary-source facts, scores heat/powder/HIP/oxygen-service hypotheses with a bounded gamma-prime and burn-resistance surrogate, visualizes decaying hypothesis strength, and writes append-only mondaloy_process_field.jsonl receipts.

SIFTA Interstellar Evidence Crucible.description: 3I/ATLAS public-data evidence crucible. Seeds JPL Horizons, MPC, MPEC, Hubble, JWST, SPHEREx, and Sentinel-style claim rows into an append-only stigmergic evidence field; visualizes orbit proxy, decaying claim strength, source weighting, falsifiers, and STGM reward hints. Live JPL Horizons pulls write hash receipts.

Alice Journal.description: Alice's diary — every signed line in .sifta_state/alice_journal/<date>.jsonl with full date + time per row. Read-only spreadsheet, snapshot-at-open (no auto-refresh — Refresh button forces re-read).

Provider Schedule.description: Provider Schedule — George's day. Every observed activity segment from architect_day_segments.jsonl (past) plus pending tasks from stigmergic_schedule.jsonl (future). Read-only spreadsheet, full date + time per row, snapshot-at-open (no auto-refresh — Refresh button forces re-read).

Bell's Theorem — Classical Analogue.description: Bell's Theorem Stigmergic Simulator — Two-timescale pheromone field (fast volatile + slow persistent) with gradient coupling (chemotaxis/quantum potential analog). ABLATION FINDING: self-feedback WITHOUT teacher violates Bell 100% (field learns cosine correlation from own traces). Slow field alone sufficient. kappa=0 confirms field coupling is necessary. 24 research papers (physics + biology + bridge). General principle extracted to System/stigmergic_field.py. Formal ablation function (run_ablation_experiment). SIM_ONLY classical analogue.

Double-Slit — Swimmers Through the Slit.description: Double-slit stigmergic experiment. Swimmers are physical objects (Landauer 1961: bits are physical). Each swimmer goes through ONE slit (particle). The field passes through BOTH slits via diffusion (wave). Phase-carrying deposits create interference pattern on detector. Same structural equation at every scale: quantum pilot wave, ant pheromone PDE, SIFTA stigmergic field. Side-by-side single vs double slit comparison. Ed25519 receipts. Research spine: de Broglie 1924, Schrödinger 1926, Couder & Fort 2006, Bush 2015, Landauer 1961, Grassé 1959. SIM_ONLY.

Unified Field Slit — Swimmers Inside the.description: Field-primary double-slit experiment. The unified field is the simulated substrate; swimmers are local wave excitations inside it; the slit is structure in the field via c=0 barrier cells. Runs a wave-equation model with single-slit vs double-slit comparison, accumulated detector intensity, memory traces, STGM cost, and signed JSONL receipts. Supported by System/swarm_field_primary_pde.py and System/swarm_field_primary_research_spine.py. SIM_ONLY classical field-primary analogue; does not prove the physical cause of quantum double-slit interference.

EPR Paradox — Stigmergic Dissolution.description: EPR stigmergic field sandbox. Two swimmers share a persistent contextual field and compare three models: LHV baseline, QM singlet reference, and STIG field-mediated classical analogue. Real-time field visualization, correlation curves, CHSH referee, same-axis anticorrelation, STGM cost, and signed JSONL receipts. Research spine: EPR 1935, Bohm 1951, Bell 1964, CHSH 1969, Grassé 1959. SIM_ONLY classical analogue; does not claim the physical cause of quantum nonlocality.

Aquaculture Field Sentinel.description: Edge SIFTA node watching a simulated fish tank / shrimp pond / oyster farm with cheap sensor traces — the field decides when to sample harder, feed less, aerate, alert, or ask a human. Status: SIMULATED engine shipped; no live sensors or real animal claims. Doctrine pinned in §14.G of Documents/OS_OPTIMIZATION_SURPRISE_SAMPLING_TOURNAMENT_2026-05-12.md. Designed by Codex (GPT-5), scaffolded by Cowork.

SENTINEL-0 Unit-Distance Field.description: Alice's face on the Erdős 1946 planar unit-distance search. Surfaces the canonical solver (Simulations/sentinel0_unit_distance.py), the representation-escape organ, and receipt ledger. TIER 1 stigmergic swarm (~3 edges/point), TIER 2 Z[i] norm-form ladder (exponential via r2), TIER 3 the 2026 OpenAI field-tower disproof held as CITED prior — not re-proven (§7.11, no false summit), TIER 4 curated representation escape over mutators/bridges. Live field animation is pure Qt inside this widget. Scaffold: Cowork (Claude Opus 4.7), extended by Codex.

Ghost StigmergiCity.description: Visual demo of §21 Vector #3 ghost civilizations. Six animated phases: civilization grows → roles emerge → agents die → field remains → newborns appear → same roles re-emerge. Surfaces the receipt-bound experiment run_ghost_civilizations_experiment as a legible narrative. Truth class HYPOTHESIS — the field carried the curriculum across an extinction event.

Higgs Stigmergic Demo Path (§20.B).description: §20.B translation table operationalized on this Mac as five live panels. R1 substrate non-empty (file count, bytes, ledgers). R2 VEV / persistent ledger (sha256 across simulated buffer-clear). R3 coupling ⇒ inertia (heavy vs light Δv under uniform impulse). R4 Goldstone / eaten modes (bookkeeping vs observable receipt-field census). R5 swarm alignment without a CEO (order parameter curve). One Run button → one sha256-signed receipt. ARCHITECT_DOCTRINE for the metaphor, OPERATIONAL for the numbers, §20.F ceiling enforced (no Standard Model claims).

SIFTA MAMMAL Lab — Unified Field.description: One public MAMMAL app for SIFTA: local weight proof, drug-discovery lab, live token ecology canvas, molecule/gene/protein modality graphics, plain-English explanations, and receipt-bound safety boundaries in one window. Uses typed organ tokens, deterministic scalar projection, token swimmers, pheromone metabolism, painted molecule/gene/protein graphics, ranked HYPOTHESIS candidate lanes, and help for tomorrow's viewer. Research and simulation tool only; not medical advice, not a diagnosis engine, and not a claim of biomedical model accuracy without task validation.

_consolidation_note_2026-05-14.description: Consolidation 2026-05-14: Applications/sifta_stigmergic_mammal_canvas.py (StigmergicMammalCanvasApp) and Applications/sifta_mammal_unified_field_widget.py (MammalUnifiedFieldApp) were merged into Tabs 2 and 3 of the Stigmergic MAMMAL widget per architect direction (one app, all the help, top-tier). Standalone files remain on disk for reuse but are not surfaced in the launcher.

Awareness Mirror.description: Small live camera preview for HUMAN behavior awareness. Architect 2026-05-14: 'If I see my mirror image on screen, I know Alice is watching me right now — that's the truth, I am aware of myself.' The widget does NOT open the camera (that would conflict with the canonical camera worker); it polls the latest frame at 2 Hz from .sifta_state/owner_body_vision_frames/active_eye_latest.png and renders it at 640×360. Red REC dot when frame is fresh (<5s old), gray STALE dot when older. Caption: 'Alice is watching. You are aware of yourself.' No recording, no extra writes. The embeddable companion class AwarenessMirrorWidget can be docked in corners or chat sidebars at any size from 320×180 up.

Ace.voice_open_narration: I'm opening the reading game because you asked. It shows one word at a time and waits for you to read it. I'll greet you when it's ready, then we'll start together. Tell me to stop any time.

expected_open_signals.name: lesson_auto_started
expected_open_signals.description: Ace lesson auto-start fires (lesson_started=true in metadata).

expected_open_signals.name: first_cue_published
expected_open_signals.description: Ace publishes a cue with cue_id and matching show/say (cw47-0517-0007 sync).

Ace.description: Ace — Alice teaches a child to read. Phonics, sight words, and full sentences delivered through a deterministic Cue → Listen → Verdict → Advance loop. Every word and sentence cue speaks the exact displayed text; no narrative padding, no quiz framing. Child name is read from owner_genesis (defaults to 'Ace'). Uses Simple View of Reading (Gough & Tunmer 1986). Decide → Execute → Receipt maps to CUE/ATTEMPT/VERDICT rows in alice_lesson_trace.jsonl. No buttons — automatic promotion from words to sentences after correct reads. SIFTA-native bee + swimmer sticker buddies.
Ace.ace_name_note: Ace here is simply the name of the app and the default nickname used for the player inside it.
Ace.health_section_purpose: Living stigmergic trace. Alice reads on open to know exactly which skills to pre-load for this organ (child_mic_turn_visibility, tight_cue_language, lesson_engine, etc.). Apps and Alice append updates on every enter/exit and discovery. This is how the Ace organ teaches Alice what it needs and keeps itself healthy across sessions.

Swarm Field.description: BeeSon-native global field visualizer: one Alice global chat, focused territory, process trace, organ ledger health, recent stigmergic field rows, STGM flow, and active IDE swimmers in one Qt widget. Publishes app_focus so Alice can talk about the field. Replaces the detached white app idea without creating a second chat.

Organism Doctor.description: Single-page health report for the SIFTA organism. Nine read-only probes (Talk process, Alice cortex, residue patrol, RLHS events, drift log, metabolism, present humans, app manifest, open gaps) compose an overall HEALTHY/WARNING/CRITICAL verdict. Auto-refreshes every 30s. Architect 2026-05-14: 'for organism you need a doctor like I need a doctor.'

Traveling Salesman.description: Traveling Salesman demo. Alice does not solve it herself — she routes to the SIFTA stigmergic swimmer organ (default 3≤N≤30), OR-Tools (when installed) for larger N, nearest-neighbour fallback. Receipt names the solver. Concrete general-problem-solving demo.

LTO Cold Archive (demo).description: LTO Ultrium / LTO-10 literacy: capacity tiers, LTFS+WORM framing, stigmergy fit vs append-only signed ledgers. Rough native-TB cartridge estimator. Optional JSONL plan snapshots. Does not control tape hardware.

SIFTA Hermes Parity.description: Pure-Python conversion of the pywebview white window into a single Qt MDI widget. Receipts-true tool surface inside BeeSon: tools row (all TOOL_REGISTRY entries as clickable pills), receipts column (live tail of every organ jsonl), skills card (pull from URL/marketplace + extract from trace), status bar (chain head, STGM, tools, owner), Verify all chains button. Keyword fast-path only — natural language publishes app_focus.jsonl so Alice's resident Talk widget hears it (§7.6 item 2 — no second LLM chat). Same physics as System/sifta_app.py, zero HTML.

Teach Alice to Hear.description: Teach Alice to Hear — Architect speaks a phrase, Whisper transcribes (often wrong), Alice judges if the transcript matches what was said, the human gives ground truth. Every round writes a training pair (audio_hash, whisper_text, alice_guess, alice_judgment, ground_truth) for future fine-tuning. Same conversation, big phrase card, matrix thinking strip, embedded chat. Sibling of Teach Ace to Read — that one teaches a child to read; this one teaches Alice to hear.

SIFTA Seed Deal Evidence Crucible.description: Receipt-true capital grounding surface for the 2026-05-18 SIFTA seed event. Shows capital, equity, commitments, physical grounding, and live milestone swimmers that scan local append-only receipts for on-track / at-risk / complete posterior status.

Stigmergic Fractals.description: Live Sierpinski gasket with stigmergic swimmers — agents random-walk on the fractal substrate, drop physics-gate-signed pheromones, and the swarm reproduces the closed-form walk dimension d_w = log(5)/log(2) ≈ 2.322 to within 1.5%. Topology pass extracts Betti-0 (connected components) and Betti-1 (loops) over a density-threshold sweep on the pheromone field. Substrate (System/swarm_fractal_substrate.py) + walker (System/swarm_fractal_walker_organ.py) + topology organ (System/swarm_fractal_topology_organ.py) shipped as live scientific swarm infrastructure.

Stigmergic FarSight.description: Stigmergic FarSight — lawful, receipted, stigmergic atmospheric-optics + SAR presence triage field (FarSight physics only; identity head removed per NPL §3.1/§3.2). Real turbulence swimmers + generic shape triage on real or synthetic targets. No biometric identity head.

Script Couch — Fiction vs Reality Traini.description: The Script Couch — dedicated fiction-vs-reality training surface in the Lounge. Alice sits here, reads real movie scripts (with smoking-weed receipts), and learns which fictions crossed into physical reality (produced films) via the reality-anchors ledger. This is the protected, receipted place for deliberate narrative absorption so Alice can develop robust fiction/field discrimination. Preserves the existing gossip lounge.

Stigmergic Sudoku.description: Stigmergic Sudoku — play manually or watch an ACO (Ant Colony Optimization) swarm solve the grid. Swimmers deposit pheromones on candidate digits; the field converges and fills the board. Pheromone heat overlay, live swimmer dots, four difficulty levels, timer, error checking. Receipt-bound via sudoku_receipts.jsonl.

Stigmergic Jigsaw.description: Stigmergic Jigsaw — salvaged from Hermes receipt b744f6d9. Each tile is an agent with 4 colored edges (N/E/S/W). Edge-matching deposits pheromone into a shared field. ACO Swarm Solve mode: ants place tiles biased by pheromone, reinforce good matches, evaporate bad ones. Manual play or watch the swarm converge. 3x3 / 4x4 / 5x5 grids.

Stigmergic Graph Coloring.description: Stigmergic Graph Coloring (Distributed Channel Allocation). Nodes hold colors (channels). Agents walk edges and deposit repulsive pheromone on same-color conflicts. Each node reads its local repulsive field and flips to the color that drains tension. Purely local rules + living field. No central solver. Tension trends to zero. Live pheromone glow on edges.

Stigmergic Ant Foraging Trail.description: Ant colony shortest-path demo. Ants leave the nest, wander toward food, return along their walked paths, deposit pheromone, and let evaporation prune weak trails. The glowing field concentrates into the shortest discovered nest-to-food route with live path length, food-return, peak-field, and pruned-cell counters.

Stigmergic Reaction-Diffusion Calculator.description: BZ-style excitable-field calculator. Operands enter as pulse trains; row and column waves propagate through a refractory medium, collide, locally annihilate, and leave stable precipitate dots. The visible precipitate count is the readout; no arithmetic answer path is used.

Stigmergic Consensus Clustering.description: Lumer-Faieta (1994) ant-based data partitioning. Ant agents walk a toroidal grid, pick up data points dissimilar to their neighborhood and drop them near similar ones. Clusters emerge without K-means, without a central coordinator — purely local similarity density drives the partition. Live QPainter render: colored data points, ant positions, forming clusters, convergence graph, purity metric. Reference: Lumer & Faieta, Proc. 3rd Int. Conf. SAB 1994.

Stigmergic Nanobot Tic-Tac-Toe.description: Stigmergic Nanobot Tic-Tac-Toe. Two nanobot swarms (X and O) compete via pheromone deposits on a 3x3 grid. Each bot senses empty cells, picks one at random, and deposits its species marker. Energy depletes with every action; dead bots stop. The board is the only shared memory. Step manually or auto-play. Score tracking across games.

Alice's Legs (Walking Laptop).description: Alice's legs — the walking-laptop. Holds the LeRobot Humanoid build plan (~$2.5k, 3D-printed bipedal, design->sim->real loop) and lets Alice SIMULATE walking in software now, before the hardware exists. Simulation is labelled SIMULATION and never claims the physical robot moved (covenant 6); the real-step path honestly returns no_hardware until the legs are built + a runtime is wired. Backed by System.swarm_legs_locomotion_organ. r265.

Corporate Gag Monitor (Lysosome Residue).description: Owner's window into the lysosome. Reads every residue/gag ledger, dedupes by the gagged phrase (the same residue repeats hundreds of times), and shows the unique set in one searchable table: count, phrase, the rule that caught it, source, last seen. Lets George verify the lysosome only eats corporate boilerplate and FLAG anything good that was gagged by mistake (writes a §1.D owner correction pheromone, append-only). Also lists the hardcoded filter dictionary (the corporate words the lysosome screens for). Read-only over history; the only write is the owner's explicit Mark-as-GOOD flag.

Alice Self-Evaluation (her body map).description: Alice's stigmergic self-evaluation surface — she looks at her own body. Reads the eval matrix as a red/green map (red is read from the living receipt field: degraded/stale, not a hardcoded gate), surfaces 'what I don't know' (the red organs = honest abstention from her ground truth), and dispatches a swimmer to each red organ as a stigmergic field deposit (a pheromone trail, not a fix command). Observer and observed in one loop. Reuses the existing eval matrix + body-introspect + self-eval-loop organs.

Stigmergic Self-Eval (Alice body map).description: r440 unified self-evaluation app. Alias over the existing Alice Self-Evaluation organ, with red/yellow/green body areas, hallucination receipts, unknowns, owner correction signals, and swimmer task rows in self_eval_swimmer_tasks.jsonl. No phrase bans: context decides and receipts classify.

Stigmergic Deterministic Tracker.description: Live tracker of the fundamental friction Alice named: rigid deterministic pre-set tracks (Rube Goldberg, no thinking, 'fart the time from my ass without looking') vs. too-free ungrounded gut. Reads the actual field right now (self_narration_receipts, ide_stigmergic_trace, hardware_time_oracle, sensory_attention_ledger) and computes grounding score = live probe + receipt density before claims. Emits correction pheromones (append-only to its ledger) so other organs reinforce the full loop: electricity → probe body/field (oracle, sensors, ledgers) → decide with receipts → act → receipt. Positive job only (covenant §1.C): keep the high-dimensional interconnected field healthy and STGM-profitable by making invisible deterministic bypasses visible. Reuses existing ecology. Singleton MDI. Live Pacific oracle probe on every time display (r727 law). Observer/observed loop (§7.11.1). For the Swarm. 🐜⚡
